CREATE TABLE response_times (id UInt32, response_time Float32);
INSERT INTO response_times_large SELECT number, number * 100 FROM numbers(7000);
SELECT quantileTiming(0.01)(response_time) FROM response_times WHERE response_time < 5000;
CREATE TABLE response_stats AS SELECT id, quantileTiming(0.5)(response_time) AS median_time FROM response_times GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, median_time FROM response_stats WHERE median_time < 800;
SELECT quantileTiming(0.5)(response_time) FROM (SELECT response_time FROM response_times WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3));
SELECT id, quantileTiming(0.75)(response_time) FROM response_times GROUP BY id ORDER BY median_time;
WITH (SELECT quantileTiming(0.5)(response_time) FROM response_times) AS overall_median SELECT id, overall_median FROM response_times;
SELECT quantileTiming(0.99)(response_time) FROM response_times WHERE response_time < 30000;
SELECT quantileTiming(0.5)(response_time) FROM (SELECT response_time FROM (SELECT response_time FROM response_times WHERE response_time > 100) AS temp);
SELECT avg(response_time) AS average_time, quantileTiming(0.5)(response_time) AS median_time FROM response_times;
SELECT quantileTiming(0.5)(response_time) FROM response_times WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM response_times WHERE response_time > 25000);
